topic: Absolute Value Function and its Graph

questions.question: The graph of $y = |x - 3|$ has a vertex at
The axis of symmetry for $y = |2x + 1|$ is
Which of the following is the graph of $y = -|x + 2| + 1$?

options.A: A downward-facing V-graph with vertex at (-2, 1)
options.B: An upward-facing V-graph with vertex at (-2, -1)
options.C: A downward-facing V-graph with vertex at (2, 1)
options.D: An upward-facing V-graph with vertex at (2, 1)

Graph the function $y = |2x - 1| + 2$ and identify its vertex, axis of symmetry, and direction of opening. Required space: 5 lines

A music composer is creating a song with a frequency that follows the function $y = |x + 2| - 1$. If the frequency at $x = 0$ is 1 Hz, find the value of $x$ when the frequency is 3 Hz. Required space: 5 lines

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Emphasize the importance of identifying the vertex, axis of symmetry, and direction of opening for absolute value graphs
Tip 2: Encourage students to analyze the given functions and identify any transformations
Tip 3: Remind students to use the properties of absolute value functions to solve problems
